prompt: Create an ultra-realistic, slightly unsettling smartphone food photo of a round transparent plastic takeout bowl filled with spicy Chinese malatang hot pot in dark red chili oil broth. The camera looks down from a high three-quarter overhead angle, tightly cropped so the circular bowl fills most of the frame. Show a messy, casual tabletop setting with a crinkled clear plastic bag underneath the bowl, a second empty plastic lid or bowl blurred in the upper left, and disposable chopsticks plus a white napkin partly visible in the upper right. Inside the bowl, include exactly 10 clearly visible food items: 1 large pale lotus root slice with multiple oval holes near the lower left center, 2 round beige fish balls or meatballs at the upper right and lower right, 1 pale boiled egg-like oval near the top right, 1 orange crab stick or seafood stick on the upper left, 1 cluster of thin enoki mushrooms in the center, 1 glossy black seaweed or wood ear mushroom piece on the right center, 1 large translucent gray rice cake or fish cake oval near the lower center, 1 green leafy vegetable strip along the bottom edge, and 1 rectangular tofu or bean curd piece near the right side. The broth should look oily, murky, and heavily seasoned with floating chili flakes, pepper specks, sesame-like bits, and red-orange grease stains clinging to the inside rim of the plastic container. Use harsh indoor lighting, muted colors, visible grain, imperfect focus, greasy reflections, and casual snapshot composition, making it feel like a real unedited phone photo rather than a staged food advertisement. No people, no text, no watermark.
